command: uv run --with boto3 --with "botocore[crt]" contractforge-aws smoke-kafka-provider-matrix --account-id 449112696824 --region us-east-1 --msk-cluster-arn arn:aws:kafka:us-east-1:449112696824:cluster/cf-msk-serverless-validation-20260609/29b14912-8ac0-4fdc-b638-986c3cb910b9-s1 --confluent-bootstrap-servers pkc-619z3.us-east1.gcp.confluent.cloud:9092 --confluent-secret-arn arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-east-1:449112696824:secret:contractforge/confluent/kafka-MhIMbL --execute

maturity_scope.decision: AWS Kafka maturity is validated with Amazon MSK, the AWS-native managed Kafka provider. Confluent Cloud compatibility is tracked separately and is not a blocker for AWS maturity.

notes: Azure Event Hubs through Kafka protocol is already validated for Glue available-now streaming.
Evidence includes checkpoint progression, no-input rerun, quarantine/target writes, cost and Athena audit.

resolved_blockers: Glue job definitions now preserve AWS Glue Connections so VPC-backed jobs can reach MSK.
Private VPC jobs use S3-hosted Python dependency wheels instead of outbound PyPI.
The validation VPC includes S3 gateway and Glue interface endpoints for private Glue/Iceberg execution.

notes: Not required for AWS Kafka maturity because the required provider is Amazon MSK.
Promote to live validation only when claiming cross-provider Confluent Cloud compatibility on AWS.

optional_compatibility_items: Promote Confluent-compatible validation from OPTIONAL_READY_TO_RUN to a live available-now Glue run only if AWS claims Confluent Cloud compatibility.
Record Confluent-compatible Glue run ids, stream evidence rows, checkpoint state, cost rows and redacted failure evidence when that optional compatibility claim is made.
